title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Bosch India Software

jsonLd.title: Mid-Level Frontend Developer at Bosch India Software
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Bosch India Software. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Frontend Developer to strengthen our Mysuru-based team.

About Bosch India Software:
Bosch India Software is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Write clean, maintainable, and well-documented code
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Write and execute unit tests and integration tests

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Go
• Proficiency in CI/CD
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Machine Learning

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bosch India Software!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
